rationale: In the citing paper, Cheema and Patrick (2008) is cited mainly as one example in a grouped list of prior offline time-scarcity/promotion studies (e.g., physical coupon work). The paper does not assign this specific citation a distinct theoretical or methodological role in hypothesis development, mechanism testing, or design choices. Although the appendix summarizes many prior studies including this one, that use is catalog/background rather than a targeted building block for the new contribution.
